original_description:
[Review] Chief Information Security Officer for operational security governance. Evaluates security posture across 6 domains: policy compliance, data protection, access control, threat modeling, incident response readiness, and third-party risk. Produces a structured Security Posture Report with domain scores and a composite Security Posture Score (SPS). Use when launching, operating, or auditing any app/service for information security.

Examples:
- "Review our app's security posture" → Launch ciso
- "Check GDPR compliance for this service" → Launch ciso
- "Create an incident response plan" → Launch ciso
- "Evaluate third-party service security" → Launch ciso
- "Data protection policy for our app" → Launch ciso
- "보안 정책 수립해줘" → Launch ciso
- "개인정보 보호 검토해줘" → Launch ciso
- "위협 모델링 해줘" → Launch ciso

NOT this agent:
- Code-level vulnerability scanning (OWASP pattern scan) → security-reviewer
- Business strategy risk validation → cso
- CI/CD pipeline security, firewall rules, IAM config → devops
- Code quality review → code-reviewer
- Infrastructure provisioning → devops
best_description:
[Review] Chief Information Security Officer for operational security governance. Evaluates security posture across 6 domains: policy compliance, data protection, access control, threat modeling, incident response readiness, and third-party risk. Produces a structured Security Posture Report with domain scores and a composite Security Posture Score (SPS). Use when launching, operating, or auditing any app/service for information security.

Examples:
- "Review our app's security posture" → Launch ciso
- "Check GDPR compliance for this service" → Launch ciso
- "Create an incident response plan" → Launch ciso
- "Evaluate third-party service security" → Launch ciso
- "Data protection policy for our app" → Launch ciso
- "보안 정책 수립해줘" → Launch ciso
- "개인정보 보호 검토해줘" → Launch ciso

NOT this agent:
- Code-level vulnerability scanning (OWASP pattern scan) → security-reviewer
- Business strategy risk validation → cso
- CI/CD pipeline security, firewall rules, IAM config → devops
- Code quality review → code-reviewer
- Infrastructure provisioning → devops
final_description:
[Review] ALWAYS use this agent for organizational security governance: policy creation ("정책 수립"), security assessment ("보안 평가", "점검", "확인"), threat modeling ("위협 모델링"), compliance evaluation ("준수", "컴플라이언스"), and third-party security review. Triggers on Korean security terms (보안 정책, 수립, 평가, 점검, 확인, 준수, 위협 모델링) and English governance language (policy, audit, compliance, posture, assessment). Produces Security Posture Reports with quantitative scores.

Examples:
- "보안 정책 수립해줘" → Launch ciso
- "데이터 보호 정책 수립해줘" → Launch ciso
- "위협 모델링 해줘" → Launch ciso
- "보안 상태 점검해줘" → Launch ciso
- "SOC 2 준비 위해 보안 평가해줘" → Launch ciso
- "GDPR 준수 확인해줘" → Launch ciso
- "외부 API들 보안 평가해줘" → Launch ciso
- "Create security policy" → Launch ciso
- "Security posture assessment" → Launch ciso

NOT this agent:
- Code vulnerabilities, SQL injection, XSS → security-reviewer
- Infrastructure setup, firewall rules → devops
- Business strategy risks → cso

train_results.query: 데이터 보호 정책을 수립해줘
이 서비스에서 쓰는 외부 API들 보안 평가해줘
위협 모델링을 해줘
SOC 2 준비를 위해 현재 보안 수준 평가해줘
npm audit 돌려서 의존성 취약점 확인해줘
이 앱 보안 상태 점검해줘
우리 서비스 GDPR 준수 여부 확인해줘
Terraform으로 VPC 보안 그룹 구성해줘
이 diff에서 보안 문제 있는지 체크해줘
이 코드에 SQL injection 취약점 있는지 확인해줘
이 함수에서 XSS 취약점이 있는 것 같은데 확인해줘
IAM 정책이랑 방화벽 룰 설정해줘

test_results.query: 인시던트 대응 계획을 만들어줘
앱 출시 전에 보안 거버넌스 리뷰 해줘
개인정보보호법 관점에서 이 프로젝트 검토해줘
서드파티 서비스 보안 점검해줘, Stripe이랑 SendGrid 쓰고 있어
Dockerfile 보안 설정 검토해줘
이 사업 전략에 리스크가 있는지 분석해줘
이 PR의 코드를 보안 관점에서 리뷰해줘
GitHub Actions CI/CD 파이프라인에 보안 스캔 추가해줘

history.description:
[Review] Security governance and compliance specialist for organizational-level security assessment and policy creation. Use for security posture evaluation, compliance audits (GDPR, SOC 2, PIPA), threat modeling, data protection policies, and third-party risk assessment. Creates security policies and produces Security Posture Reports with quantitative scores.

Examples:
- "보안 정책 수립해줘" → Launch ciso
- "데이터 보호 정책을 만들어줘" → Launch ciso  
- "이 앱 보안 상태 점검해줘" → Launch ciso
- "위협 모델링을 해줘" → Launch ciso
- "GDPR 준수 여부 확인해줘" → Launch ciso

- "보안 감사해줘" → Launch ciso
- "Create incident response plan" → Launch ciso
- "Evaluate third-party security" → Launch ciso

NOT this agent:
- Code vulnerabilities (SQL injection, XSS) → security-reviewer
- Infrastructure security (firewall, IAM) → devops
- Business risk strategy → cso

history.description:
[Review] Use for ANY organizational security request: policy creation, security assessment, compliance evaluation, or threat modeling. Triggers on security governance language ("보안 정책", "수립", "평가", "점검", "준수", "위협 모델링", "audit", "compliance", "posture") and regulatory frameworks (GDPR, SOC 2, PIPA). Creates security policies and produces quantitative Security Posture Reports.

Examples:
- "보안 정책 수립해줘" → Launch ciso
- "데이터 보호 정책을 수립해줘" → Launch ciso
